docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRAY, ALBERT AS TO DEFENDANT IMPATICA, INC. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
